properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign JWT tokens. Must be at least 32 characters. Set via JWT_SECRET environment variable in production.

properties.name: app.jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.frontend-url
properties.description: Base URL of the frontend application. Used for CORS and OAuth2 redirects.

properties.name: aws.s3.bucket
properties.description: AWS S3 bucket name for storing user avatars and media.

properties.name: aws.s3.region
properties.description: AWS region where the S3 bucket is hosted.

properties.name: aws.s3.access-key
properties.description: AWS access key ID. Use environment variables in production.

properties.name: aws.s3.secret-key
properties.description: AWS secret access key. Use environment variables in production.
